postmark.Subject: 2nd mortgage — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Second mortgage opportunity for Patricia Simmons.

Property: 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3, appraised $720,000.
Existing first mortgage: Scotiabank, balance $380,000.
New 2nd mortgage request: $120,000.
Combined LTV: 69% ($500k total / $720k).
Standalone LTV of 2nd: 17%.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
